name: chem-teacher-mini
description: 高中化学教学辅助系统 - 微信小程序

scripts.build:mp-weixin: uni build -p mp-weixin && cp -r cloudfunctions dist/build/mp-weixin/cloudfunctions 2>/dev/null && node -e "const f=require('fs'),p='dist/build/mp-weixin/project.config.json',c=JSON.parse(f.readFileSync(p));if(!c.cloudfunctionRoot){c.cloudfunctionRoot='cloudfunctions/';f.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(c,null,2))}" || true
